title: What does the claimant want from the claim?
h1: What does the claimant want from the claim? (optional)
legend: What does the claimant want if their claim is successful?
detailsSummaryComp: Compensation - what can a tribunal award?

detailsTextComp.p1: If a tribunal decides the claimant has been unfairly dismissed, they'll normally receive compensation which is made up of:
detailsTextComp.li1: a basic award - fixed sum worked out using a standard formula
detailsTextComp.li2: a compensatory award - compensation for the actual money lost due to dismissal, or which the claimant expects to lose in future because of their dismissal
detailsTextComp.p2: Compensation can be reduced for various reasons and a tribunal will tell you more about this if it applies in the specific circumstances.
detailsTextComp.p3: In disciplinary or grievance cases, the claimant may be entitled to an increased award if an employer fails to follow the guidance set out in the
detailsTextComp.p4: Similarly, awards can be reduced if a tribunal decides the claimant failed to follow the guidance set out in the
detailsTextComp.acasLinkText: Acas Code of Practice on disciplinary and grievance procedures (opens in new tab).
detailsTextComp.p5: In certain claims, such as those involving discrimination, a tribunal may compensate the claimant for 'injury to feelings' (individual hurt and distress the claimant may have suffered) in addition to compensation for financial loss.

detailsTextRecom: If the claimant's employer is found to have discriminated against them, a tribunal can make a recommendation that the respondent take specific steps to reduce the effect of the discrimination on the claimant
compensationOnlyHint: You'll be asked to provide an estimate of total compensation

tribunalRecommendation.checkbox: If claiming discrimination, a tribunal recommendation

tribunalRecommendationHint: You'll be asked to describe the claimant's request to the tribunal

oldJob.checkbox: If claiming unfair dismissal, to get their old job back and be compensated

anotherJob.checkbox: If claiming unfair dismissal, to get another job with the same employer or associated employer and compensation (re-engagement)
